f2_completability.method: equal-rows M=(u,v,u,v); Lemma C / Step5+ bijection_completable

guardrails: Item 11 localizes and explains the residue; it does NOT close the 15/49 matrix.
All counts are over the full 7040 integer magic squares via the certified pipeline.
The result is a negative/obstruction theorem: no F2 or linear closure exists.
No public record-level widening or universal Endpoint-24 affine-defect atlas claim is made.
The B3 support-action matrix remains a finite certificate (L24 framing).

metadata.description: The defect-6 error-space realizability (the open residue of the B3 15/49 matrix) is integer-magic, not F2, and has no GL(4,2) symmetry: exactly 13 of 35 two-flats are realized, all 35 are F2-completable, and the stabilizer of the 13-set is trivial.

summary.reading: Over all 7040 order-4 magic squares the defect-6 stratum realizes exactly 13 of the 35 two-dimensional error spaces.  Every two-flat is the span of an equal-rows one-dependent-side matrix and is Lemma C bijection-completable, so the cut to 13 is not an F2 / bijectivity fact -- it is forced by the integer magic constraints. GL(4,2) is transitive on the 35 two-flats and the stabilizer of the 13-set is trivial, so no linear invariant selects the realized spaces.  A weight-signature necessary condition (the space contains a weight-3 vector and no weight-4 vector, in the anchor basis) cuts 35 to 18; the residual 18 -> 13 cut has no symmetry and is the irreducible arithmetic core of the B3 15/49 matrix.
summary.scope_note: This does not close the 15/49 matrix.  It proves the residue is irreducibly integer-arithmetic: neither Lemma C nor any GL(4,2) symmetry can derive it, so the B3 support-action matrix is a genuine finite certificate, as the L24 framing stated.

theorem.name: Item 11 defect-6 realizability obstruction
theorem.statement: The order-4 magic squares realize exactly 13 of the 35 two-dimensional F2 error spaces at defect 6.  All 35 are Lemma C bijection-completable, so the restriction is not an F2 property; and the GL(4,2) stabilizer of the realized 13-set is trivial while GL(4,2) is transitive on the 35, so the restriction is not a linear-algebraic invariant.  Hence the B3 15/49 realization residue is an irreducible integer-magic certificate.
